name: Luma AI Agents
summary: Public-surface review of Luma AI Agents

claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: Creative agents that make you prolific

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The homepage contains a direct link to the 'PRICING' page.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: Explore what you can create with Luma. Discover workflows, best practices, and new ways to bring ideas to life with an intelligent multimodal Agent by your side.

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: Luma AI will provide implementation support and training across Serviceplan Group’s global teams to ensure consistent adoption and responsible deployment.
